## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration opportunities between Marcel Santilli (growthx.ai) and Anita Lacea, leveraging Anita's expertise in AI and full-stack knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai has developed a coding agent for creating AI workflows, represented in code, with a runtime layer for execution](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Anita's experience at Amazon includes building modular AI architecture for ad generation, increasing engagement and revenue](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Both parties see potential for collaboration, with growthx.ai having high demand but capacity constraints in certain areas](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Next steps include Anita speaking with growthx.ai's CTO to explore specific collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's AI Workflow Platform

  - [Developed a coding agent that writes AI workflows in code](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Runtime layer allows execution of workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Represents complex knowledge work in reproducible code](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Enables experts to build precise, controllable plans for complex work](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Current stats: 31,000 workflow runs, 445,000 activities this month](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)

### Anita's Experience at Amazon

  - [Built modular AI architecture for ad generation](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [System pulled from product descriptions, reviews, and considered seasonality](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Increased engagement and generated $60 million in revenue within a year](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Served both small sellers and large companies like Coca-Cola and Revlon](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Built from scratch, including fine-tuning and modifying model architectures](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Translating business problems into AI solutions](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Architecting and reviewing code for AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Exploring new use cases and industries (e.g., construction, legal)](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Leveraging Anita's full-stack knowledge and product expertise](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Current Market Demand

  - [High demand for AI workflow solutions across various industries](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Companies seeking help in translating processes into AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [growthx.ai currently capacity-constrained, not demand-constrained](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

### Technical Discussion

  - [Use of multiple models and APIs in workflows (e.g., Recraft for illustrations)](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Importance of thought processes in approaching complex problems](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Discussion of tools like Cursor and Tempo Labs for AI-assisted development](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to introduce Anita to growthx.ai's CTO, Danua](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Anita and Danua to discuss potential collaboration opportunities in more detail](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Explore a suitable starting point for engagement, considering Anita's availability and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Address any potential conflicts with Anita's current role at Microsoft](https://fathom.video/share/ph6jBoqPRoxumP1Md4CLu9-vZzuSzyRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
